description: Automated DJ mix pipeline — owned stem grids, Demucs sections and Kick Detector V3 evidence feeding template-based Ableton arrangement and automation

orchestrator.purpose: Main controller. Canonical --stem-grid mode runs MIK metadata only, disables Rekordbox launch/library reads, and requires full owned-grid coverage

warping.purpose: Per-beat warp markers from the selected certified grid; sec_to_clip_beats + grid_bpm_and_downbeat enforce the one-clock contract

als_generator.purpose: Template-based ALS patching, multi-clip per track for loops + viz; post-write validation is mandatory

mix_plan.purpose: Immutable hash-backed N-track production intent with exact source grids, per-track warp modes, N-1 transitions, loop ownership and canonical plan_hash
mix_plan.status: working (schema 1.3; Fresh Mix Final V2 reconciled across 58 checks and received a strong provisional listening pass)

rekordbox_reader.purpose: Manual PSSI binary parser for Rekordbox 7 phrase data + PQTZ beat grid

rekordbox_waveform.purpose: PWV5/PWV4 parser — 3-bit RGB + 5-bit height per pixel (LSB-first 16-bit words)

features.purpose: Per-beat librosa RMS + bass + PWV5 with disk cache (path/mtime/version keyed)

phrase_viz.purpose: Factual Interval records + viz-only colour segment collapse

cue_candidates.purpose: Ranked CueCandidate API with confidence + sources + reasons. 5 cue types.

report.purpose: Per-track CSV + per-mix Markdown rationale reports

mik_reader.purpose: Mixed In Key 11 GEOB tag + SQLite (MIKStore.db) reader — cues, beat grid, energy segments. Tag-only fallback if DB fails

amplitude_analysis.purpose: 1-second RMS envelope analysis: first_drop / first_break / outro_start / clean-loop-window detector + snap_to_mik_or_beat helper

waveform_preview.purpose: Blank-canvas preview PNG for visual-hint authoring (no picks shown)

desktop_analyzer.purpose: Drives MIK for canonical /mix metadata enrichment; legacy Rekordbox UI functions remain but are prohibited when --stem-grid is selected.

validate_mix_plan_als.purpose: Post-mutation N-track reconciliation: plan hash, sequence, geometry, full/partial loops, tempo, per-track WarpMode, exact grids, every swap and automation; emits hash-backed JSON

apply_automation.purpose: Patches volume crossfades (Utility Gain) + EQ bass kills (ChannelEQ LowShelfGain) into a Sections .als. Explicit arrangement-report swaps remain exact at valid overlap-start/loop boundaries; only the overlap end has a fade-room guard. Line-level XML patching, \r\n line endings, dynamic AutomationTarget discovery.

learn_from_correction.purpose: Diffs two Sections .als files (Claude proposal vs Sam correction). Extracts automation envelopes per track, scopes to overlap zones, detects correction patterns (bass_swap_moved, two_stage_bass, two_stage_volume, sneak_changed), appends to pair_history.jsonl. Supports --dry-run for preview.

apply_section_corrections.purpose: Patches .als chop boundaries via XML — 8 attributes per correction

arrange_sections.purpose: Repositions tracks by shifting all clips; natural-fill alignment from sections

sections_blind_viz.purpose: 8-quarter blind PNG renderer for section validation

kick_model_adapter.purpose: Lazy default-off Kick Detector V3 adapter; one inference exposes raw presence for musical landmarks and smoothed presence for stable coarse sections while preserving the single Demucs pass and flag-off behavior.

musical_landmarks.purpose: Report-only raw kick-dropout spans with pre-drop, section, energy and candidate-role context
